texto: We're all just wandering around with our fingers crossed, hoping we'll meet someone who will make our lostness a little less lonely.
explicacao: Citação de Alanna Rusnak sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We're all just wandering around with our fingers crossed, hoping we'll meet someone who will make…” articula reflexao, esperanca, lonely em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como lonely.

texto: Joy. In every breath. In every moment. In every turn of the blossom to face the sun. In every stream of juice that trails my chin from fruit so sweet. In Him. In the coolness of the evening when He walks beside us and His laughter lifts across the river as He delights in our wonder over this place He has given us. In silence. In starlight. In shouting an anthem of gladness that shakes the earth and hails birds into flight.
